title: Goldman’s Varadhan Signals Dealmaking Amid Volatility
title_cn: 高盛的瓦拉丹暗示在波动中进行交易
summary: Goldman Sachs' Co-Head of Banking and Markets Ashok Varadhan said dealmaking remains resilient despite geopolitical tensions, pointing to an active pipeline including data center financing. He also struck a measured tone on markets, noting that periods of volatility are part of the cycle. Varadhan spoke in a wide-ranging interview at the Bloomberg Markets and Banking Summit in New York on April 22nd, 2026. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rare Diesel Cargoes Head to Australia from US West Coast
title_cn: 稀有柴油货物从美国西海岸前往澳大利亚
summary: A string of tankers carrying diesel from the US West Coast has begun arriving in Australia, with several more on the way, as the continent tries to contain a fuel crisis triggered by the Iran war.

title: Paschi Names Lovaglio CEO After Investors Back Him For New Term
title_cn: 在投资者支持洛瓦利奥连任新任期后，帕斯基任命洛瓦利奥为首席执行官
summary: Banca Monte dei Paschi di Siena SpA named Luigi Lovaglio as chief executive officer, marking his return to the helm of the world’s oldest bank after a dispute over strategy earlier this year.

title: Jane Street Seeks Dismissal of Terraform Insider-Trading Suit
title_cn: Jane Street 寻求驳回 Terraform 内幕交易诉讼
summary: Jane Street Group urged a judge to throw out a lawsuit accusing it of trading on inside information ahead of the $40 billion crash of cryptocurrencies associated with Terraform Labs.

title: Fed, FDIC Finalize Changes Easing Community Bank Leverage Ratio
title_cn: 美联储和联邦存款保险公司最终确定放宽社区银行杠杆率的变化
summary: US regulators finalized changes that will relax the community bank leverage ratio, building on previous steps from the Trump administration to ease capital rules for banks.

title: Oil Jumps as Iran Tensions Simmer With Hormuz Flows Blocked
title_cn: 霍尔木兹油流受阻，伊朗紧张局势加剧，油价上涨
summary: Oil jumped amid fresh signs of escalation in the Iran war, dimming prospects for an imminent resumption of flows through the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Veja os Três Assuntos Que Marcaram a Semana no Brasil
title_cn: 查看巴西本周的三个主题
summary:
A repórter Beatriz Reis conta quais foram os assuntos que marcaram a semana no Brasil. Com produção de Raphael Almeida e edição de Bárbara Nascimento.

 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Alberta Examines Three Northern Routes for Oil Pipe to Feed Asia
title_cn: 艾伯塔省正在研究向亚洲输送石油的三条北方路线
summary:
Bloomberg's Brian Platt joins Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Markets." Alberta is looking at three options for a new oil pipeline to ship 1 million barrels a day through northern British Columbia, according to people familiar with the matter, as Canadian officials make plans to sharply increase energy exports to Asia.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: 'Really Worried' About Iraq: Rachel Bronson
title_cn: 雷切尔·布朗森“非常担心”伊拉克
summary: Rachel Bronson, senior fellow at the Chicago Council on Global Affairs, senior advisor at the Bulletin of the Atomic Scientists, and author of "Thicker than Oil: America's Uneasy Partnership with Saudi Arabia" joins Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Markets."  (Source: Bloomberg)

summary: There was a noticeable absence at Lululemon Athletica Inc.’s all-hands meeting Wednesday, following the announcement of a new chief executive officer: The new hire herself.

title: Looking Past One-Time Shocks Pays Off
title_cn: 回顾过去的一次性冲击是有回报的
summary: Andrzej Skiba, head of BlueBay US fixed income at RBC Global Asset Management, joins Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Markets." The firm has assets under management of $650 billion.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Freeport Shares Slide as Indonesian Mine Restart Faces Delay
title_cn: 印尼矿山重启面临延迟，自由港股价下滑
summary: Bloomberg's Jacob Lorinc joins Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Markets." Freeport-McMoRan fell after the copper miner warned that a slower ramp-up at its flagship Grasberg mine in Indonesia will weigh on future production. The top US copper producer said it’s pushing back the restart schedule at the Grasberg complex after discovering new challenges with specialized equipment needed to restart operations following last year’s deadly mudslide.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Sheinbaum Points to Local Officials After CIA Agent Deaths
title_cn: 中央情报局特工死亡后，辛鲍姆将矛头指向当地官员
summary: President Claudia Sheinbaum sought to ease tensions with the US over the deaths of CIA agents following a drug lab bust in northern Mexico, blaming an opposition state government for failing to adhere to security protocols.

title: Paris Airport Group Cuts Stake in India’s GMR in $1 Billion Deal
title_cn: 巴黎机场集团以 10 亿美元交易减持印度 GMR 股份
summary: ADP, the operator of the main Paris airports, agreed to sell up to 7.3% of India’s GMR Airports Ltd. as part of a deal worth as much as €924 million ($1.08 billion).

title: Dollar Jumps to Highest in 10 Days as US-Iran Tensions Intensify
title_cn: 随着美伊紧张局势加剧，美元跃升至10天最高点

summary: US Treasuries fell as investor jitters multiplied around the potential for successful peace negotiations between Iranian and US officials, sending oil prices higher.

summary: The Swiss National Bank maintains an increased readiness to step into currency markets, Vice President Antoine Martin told public broadcaster RTS.

title_cn: 由于伊朗战争悬而未决，铜价从二月份以来的最高点下跌
summary: Copper fell with most other metals as investors watched for the next major developments from the Middle East after peace talks stalled, with the US and Iran both vying for control of the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Amtrak Sues Metro-North Over Denied Request to Run Work Trains
title_cn: 美国铁路公司因拒绝运营工作列车的请求而起诉北方铁路公司
summary: Amtrak is seeking a preliminary injunction against Metro-North Railroad that would allow its non-revenue trains to run between New York City’s northern suburbs and Connecticut.

title: Avis Sinks 70% in Two Days, Setting Off Cascade of Trading Halts
title_cn: Avis 两天内股价下跌 70%，引发一系列交易暂停
summary: A torrid rally in shares of Avis Budget Group Inc. has suddenly reversed, causing the price to plummet as much as 53% and triggering multiple trading halts on Thursday.

title: Blackstone’s Secondaries Unit Hits $100 Billion as Demand Grows
title_cn: 随着需求的增长，Blackstone 的二级市场部门规模达到 1000 亿美元
summary: Blackstone Inc.’s secondaries business reached $100 billion of assets under management in the first quarter, making it one of the biggest players in the market for selling secondhand stakes.

title: Gold Falls as US-Iran Hormuz Standoff Heightens Inflation Risk
title_cn: 美国与伊朗霍尔木兹海峡对峙加剧通胀风险，金价下跌
summary: Gold declined as an escalation in tension over the Strait of Hormuz drove oil prices higher, rekindling concerns over high inflation.

title: White House Reviewing SEC Bid to Ease Share-Offering Disclosures
title_cn: 白宫正在审查美国证券交易委员会 (SEC) 简化股票发行披露的提议
summary: The White House is reviewing new US Securities and Exchange Commission rules that would make it easier for companies to go public or raise capital by easing disclosures for new offerings and speeding up the registration process.

title: Warner Bros. Shareholders Approve $110 Billion Paramount Deal
title_cn: 华纳兄弟股东批准派拉蒙 1100 亿美元交易
summary: Warner Bros. Discovery Inc. shareholders voted overwhelmingly to approve a $110 billion takeover by Paramount Skydance Corp. But this is not a done deal yet. Chris Palmeri reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Why Booking a FlightWith Miles Is ReallyGetting Harder
title_cn: 为什么用里程预订航班真的变得越来越难
summary:
It’s not you, it’s actually getting harder to use miles to book your flight.

Nicole Sy explains how frequent flyers are hedging against global travel chaos by making overlapping bookings. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Intel Gives Strong AI-Fueled Outlook, Sending Shares Soaring
title_cn: 英特尔给出强劲的人工智能驱动前景，推动股价飙升
summary: Intel Corp. gave a strong sales forecast for the current period, signaling that the struggling chipmaker is finally beginning to benefit from the giant build-out of artificial intelligence infrastructure.

title: Building a Podcast Empire Is Hard, Even For Alex Cooper
title_cn: 即使对于亚历克斯·库珀来说，建立一个播客帝国也很困难
summary: It’s no longer enough to have just one big podcast hit. Today, the medium’s biggest stars want more: More shows, more ads, more money.

title_cn: 需求强劲后，AT&T 将通过债券发行筹集 60 亿美元
summary: AT&T Inc. raised $6 billion from an investment-grade debt sale, seizing on strong investor demand to bolster liquidity as it prepares to close a major network-expansion deal.

title: Oil Climbs Amid Hormuz Standoff, The Fed's Next Move | Bloomberg Markets 4/23/2026
title_cn: 美联储下一步行动：霍尔木兹海峡僵局导致油价攀升彭博市场 2026 年 4 月 23 日
summary: "Bloomberg Markets" follows the market moves across every global asset class and discusses the biggest issues for Wall Street. Today's guests: RBC Global Asset Management Head of Bluebay US Fixed Income Andrzej Skiba, Bloomberg's Ryan Vlastelica, Jacob Lorinc, Saleha Mohsin, George Ferguson, and Brian Platt.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Blackstone COO | Growth and AI-Driven Economic Tailwinds
title_cn: 黑石首席运营官 |增长和人工智能驱动的经济顺风
summary: Jon Gray, Blackstone President & COO, addressed investor concerns about market volatility and liquidity pressures. He emphasized that while noise and uncertainty may prompt investors to seek liquidity, the resilience of certain financial products, particularly Business Development Companies (BDCs), is a key factor to watch.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Tesla Sales Helped by High Gas Prices
title_cn: 高油价推动特斯拉销量增长
summary: Tesla says rising gas prices have boosted interest in its electric vehicles. The surprisingly optimistic comments came weeks after the automaker reported lower-than-expected car sales to start the year and as it pivots its focus to AI and robotics. Jessica Caldwell, head of insights at Edmunds, joins Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Tapped for Group Developing Golden Dome Software
title_cn: SpaceX 被任命为金顶软件开发团队
summary: SpaceX is part of a group of companies developing the operating system underpinning President Donald Trump’s Golden Dome initiative, according to sources. It is an expansion of the role Elon Musk's company is playing in the US missile defense shield. Bloomberg’s Michael Shepard joins Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on “Bloomberg Tech.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: ‘Looksmaxxing’ Influencer Clavicular Kicked Off YouTube Again
title_cn: “Looksmaxxing”影响者锁骨再次从 YouTube 上消失
summary: Controversial social-media figure Clavicular, known for his extreme approach to achieving male beauty standards, had his videos removed again from YouTube on Wednesday night.

title: Meta, Microsoft Look to Cut Workforces Amid Heavy AI Spending
title_cn: Meta 和微软希望在人工智能支出巨大的情况下裁员
summary: Meta Platforms Inc. and Microsoft Corp. have both taken drastic actions to cut their workforces in an effort to streamline their operations and offset heavy spending on artificial intelligence.

title: CBRE Group CEO Sees AI as Tailwind, Bullish on NYC Growth
title_cn: 世邦魏理仕集团首席执行官将人工智能视为顺风车，看好纽约市的增长
summary: CBRE Group CEO Robert Sulentic says he is bullish on long-term growth across New York City. Speaking with Norah Mulinda on Bloomberg Television, Sulentic also says CBRE will become "net winners" thanks to AI.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Intel’s $250 Billion Rally Slams Into a Potential Earnings Wall
title_cn: 英特尔 2500 亿美元的涨势撞上了潜在的盈利墙
summary: Intel Corp. has been one of the hottest stocks in the market over the past 12 months, soaring 230% to the highest price since the dot-com bubble. But the rally is facing a potential roadblock in the company’s first-quarter earnings report due after the close Thursday.

title: House GOP Leaders Unveil New Spy Powers Plan, Seek Party Unity
title_cn: 众议院共和党领导人公布新的间谍权力计划，寻求党内团结
summary: House Republicans unveiled their latest plan to extend a US spy powers tool after a week of rebellion from privacy hawks forced leadership to settle for a 10-day extension as they worked through negotiations.

title: Meta Tells Staff It Plans to Cut 10% of Jobs in Efficiency Push
title_cn: Meta 告诉员工计划裁员 10% 以提高效率
summary: Meta Platforms plans to cut 10% of workers, or roughly 8,000 employees, in an effort to boost efficiency and offset its heavy spending on artificial intelligence. Ed Ludlow reports on "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Meta Tells Staff It Will Cut 10% of Jobs in Push for Efficiency
title_cn: Meta 告诉员工将裁员 10% 以提高效率
summary: Meta Platforms Inc. plans to cut 10% of workers, or roughly 8,000 employees, in an effort to boost efficiency and offset its heavy spending on artificial intelligence.

title: US Seeks to Halt US AI Model ‘Exploitation’ by Chinese Rivals
title_cn: 美国寻求阻止中国竞争对手“利用”美国人工智能模型
summary: The Trump administration unveiled measures aimed at preventing Chinese developers from improperly using leading American AI models to build a rival generation of chatbots, marking the first major US response to Silicon Valley companies’ complaints that China is piggybacking on their success.

title: Key Takeaways on Complaints Inside Alex Cooper’s Podcast Empire
title_cn: 亚历克斯·库珀播客帝国内部投诉的主要要点
summary: The host of Call Her Daddy has been grappling with multiple challenges inside her business, some of them brought about by her husband.

title: Lyft to Acquire London Black Cab App Gett
title_cn: Lyft 将收购 London Black Cab App Gett
summary: Lyft has agreed to buy Gett, an app used for requesting black cabs in London. Lyft CEO David Risher says international growth and expansion into capital-light businesses like Gett are key to growing the rideshare company. Risher joins Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on “Bloomberg Tech.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Microsoft Offers Buyouts to About 7% of US Workers
title_cn: 微软向约 7% 的美国员工提供买断
summary: Microsoft Corp. is offering voluntary retirement to thousands of its employees in the US.

title: Texas Instruments Climbs the Most Since 2001 on Upbeat Forecast
title_cn: 德州仪器 (TI) 因乐观预测股价上涨 2001 年以来最大涨幅
summary: Texas Instruments Inc. shares jumped the most in more than two decades after the chipmaker gave a surprisingly strong forecast, helped by booming spending on data centers and industrial equipment.

title: AI Is Central to ServiceNow Platform, CEO McDermott Says
title_cn: 首席执行官 McDermott 表示，人工智能是 ServiceNow 平台的核心
summary: "We are a growth company," ServiceNow Chair and CEO Bill McDermott says while discussing the company's first-quarter earnings on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Google’s Liz Reid on How to Improve Your Search Results
title_cn: Google 的 Liz Reid 讲述如何改善搜索结果
summary: On this episode of the Odd Lots podcast, Google's Elizabeth Reid joins Joe Weisenthal and Tracy Alloway to discuss search in the world of AI. As vice president of search, Reid tells us about how AI is changing user behavior and how Google is incorporating Gemini into search. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Too Tipsy to Drive? German Suppliers Have In-Car Sensor for That
title_cn: 醉得不敢开车？德国供应商为此提供了车载传感器
summary: Volkswagen AG, Stellantis NV and Mercedes-Benz Group AG models may soon feature touchscreens able to test blood alcohol levels for drivers.

title: AI Build-Out Is a Huge Driver, Blackstone's Gray Says
title_cn: Blackstone 的 Gray 表示，人工智能的发展是一个巨大的推动力
summary: Blackstone Inc. President Jon Gray said the build-out of artificial-intelligence infrastructure is the single-biggest driver for the company right now. He speaks to Dani Burger. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Push to Unwind Bitcoin Hoarder Shows Once-Hot Trade Failing
title_cn: 推动比特币囤积者平仓表明一度热门的交易失败
summary: Shareholders in a UK Bitcoin accumulator are pushing it to sell all its tokens and wind down operations, one of the most dramatic examples of how the once-hot trade has fallen out of favor.

title: Infosys Sales Forecast Trails Estimates as IT Demand Sputters
title_cn: IT 需求下滑，Infosys 销售预测低于预期
summary: Infosys Ltd. forecast sales growth for this year below analysts’ estimates, as global enterprises curtail spending on large information technology projects to prepare for geopolitical and economic challenges.

title: IBM Fails to Shake AI Concerns With Software Sales; Shares Drop
title_cn: IBM 未能通过软件销售消除人工智能担忧；股价下跌
summary: International Business Machines Corp. posted quarterly sales in its software unit that were in line with estimates, failing to shake investor concerns about AI disruption to its business.

title: Comcast Profit Beats Estimates With Fewer Broadband Losses
title_cn: 康卡斯特利润超出预期，宽带损失减少
summary: Comcast Corp. reported first-quarter financial results that exceeded analysts’ estimates with fewer losses among broadband customers, offsetting lackluster growth at its Peacock streaming service.

title: GOP’s DHS Funding Plan Exposes Party Split on Affordability Push
title_cn: 共和党的国土安全部资助计划暴露了党派在推动负担能力方面的分歧
summary: Senate Republicans are on a collision course with many of their House counterparts over whether to use their most powerful legislative tool — a spending bill Democrats can’t stop — to narrowly fund the Homeland Security department or to go big and try one last election-year push on affordability.

title: EU Warns Trade Deal With US at Risk Over Effort to Strengthen It
title_cn: 欧盟警告与美国的贸易协议因强化协议而面临风险
summary: The European Union warned member states that efforts to strengthen safeguards in the bloc’s trade agreement with the US may cause the deal to unravel.

title: Trump Attack Order Highlights Danger of Iran’s ‘Mosquito Fleet’
title_cn: 特朗普的攻击命令凸显了伊朗“蚊子舰队”的危险
summary: President Donald Trump’s order for the US to attack Iranian gunboats is the latest sign that an asymmetrical war-fighting strategy is stymieing the world’s mightiest navy, with US aircraft and destroyers forced to track swarming speedboats in a vital energy waterway.

title: Billionaires’ Row Towers Are Flashpoint for NYC Tax on Rich
title_cn: 亿万富翁的排塔是纽约市对富人征税的导火索
summary: When Mayor Zohran Mamdani declared a new tax was coming for wealthy property owners in New York City, he wanted to make clear it was “designed for the richest of the rich.”

title: Carney, Alberta Near Deal on Carbon Price on Energy and Industry
title_cn: 艾伯塔省卡尼即将就能源和工业碳价格达成协议
summary: The Canadian government is closing in on a deal with Alberta for a carbon price on energy producers and other industries, but they’re still haggling over how quickly it will be implemented.

title: US-Iran Tensions Build in Hormuz Without Talks | Balance of Power: Early Edition 4/23/2026
title_cn: 美国与伊朗在没有谈判的情况下在霍尔木兹地区紧张局势加剧权力平衡：早期版本 2026 年 4 月 23 日
summary: On the early edition of Balance of Power,  Bloomberg Washington Correspondents Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz discuss President Trump's order to strike boats laying mines in the Strait of Hormuz as the tennuous ceasefire between the US and Iran continues without peace talks and news that Meta plans to cut 10% of its workforce. On today's show, former Deputy Commander of U.S. Central Command Vice Admiral Robert Harward (ret.), Republican Main Street Partnership President and CEO Sarah Chamberlain, former White House Deputy Chief of Staff under President Barack Obama Jim Messina, Bloomberg Economics Chief Geoeconomics Analyst Jennifer Welch, and Democrat Senator from Illinois Tammy Duckworth. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Why Modi Tried to Change India’s Parliament
title_cn: 莫迪为何试图改变印度议会
summary: Modi’s government tried to change the makeup of India ’s Parliament. Bloomberg Opinion columnist Andy Mukherjee explains what’s at stake. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Macron Offers a Glimpse of a Post-Presidency Outside Politics
title_cn: 马克龙让我们一睹卸任总统后政治之外的风采
summary: Emmanuel Macron has given few hints about his plan once he leaves the French presidency next year. But sitting among schoolchildren in Cyprus, he signaled it may not involve politics.

title: Duckworth: Iran is Trump's 'War of Choice'
title_cn: 达克沃斯：伊朗是特朗普的“选择之战”
summary:
Sen. Tammy Duckworth (D-IL), member of the Armed Services Committee, said that the war with Iran is President Trump's 'war of choice' and at the expense of the American people. 
US and Iran tensions grew over the Strait of Hormuz with both sides maintaining their blockades of the critical waterway, creating an uneasy standoff with no sign of peace talks on the horizon. 
US President Donald Trump on Thursday ordered the US Navy to shoot any boat putting mines in the strait, while the military said it intercepted two oil supertankers that tried to evade its effort to prevent passage to and from Iran’s ports. US forces boarded a “sanctioned stateless vessel” transporting oil from Iran in the Indian Ocean overnight, the Pentagon said. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump’s Social Media Blitz Divides Advisers as Iran Talks Teeter
title_cn: 随着伊朗谈判摇摇欲坠，特朗普的社交媒体闪电战使顾问们产生了分歧
summary: The prospect of Iran agreeing to more in-person peace talks with the US is being hindered by President Donald Trump’s threats and brash social media posts, according to several officials with knowledge of the diplomatic efforts to end their war.

title: Trump’s Rush to End Iran War Risks Delivering Weak Nuclear Deal
title_cn: 特朗普急于结束伊朗战争可能导致核协议薄弱
summary: President Donald Trump has repeatedly said his war against Iran is intended to prevent Tehran from ever getting a nuclear weapon. But when it comes to core nuclear issues, he risks ending up with a worse deal than the one he abandoned in his first term.

title: US Reduces Marijuana Restrictions in Lift to Ailing Industry
title_cn: 美国减少大麻限制以改善陷入困境的行业
summary: The US Justice Department reclassified state-regulated marijuana as a less dangerous drug, a major shift that could increase legal cannabis sales and help a struggling industry.

title: Ukraine Says ‘Symbolic’ Membership of EU Not Good Enough
title_cn: 乌克兰称欧盟“象征性”成员资格不够好
summary: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskiy said his country deserves “full-fledged” membership in the European Union, rejecting proposals for an alternative path that is faster but with fewer rights.

title: What ‘Rescheduling’ of Marijuana Means for Americans
title_cn: 大麻的“重新安排”对美国人意味着什么
summary: Though marijuana is now legal in 24 US states for recreational purposes and in 40 states for medical reasons, it’s still illegal at the federal level. But on April 23, the US Justice Department reclassified state-regulated medical marijuana as a less dangerous drug, a major shift that will dramatically reshape how cannabis companies operate in the coming years.

title: How Redistricting Is Reshaping US Political Battles
title_cn: 选区重新划分如何重塑美国政治斗争
summary: Voters’ approval of a map redrawing Virginia’s congressional district boundaries in Democrats’ favor marked one of the most significant developments in a yearlong nationwide battle that could determine which party controls the US House of Representatives.

title: Hungary Seeks to Cut Orban-Linked Firms From EU Defense Loan
title_cn: 匈牙利寻求削减欧尔班相关企业的欧盟国防贷款
summary: Hungary’s incoming ruling party wants to divert €16.2 billion ($19 billion) in European Union defense loans away from companies linked to outgoing Prime Minister Viktor Orban as it seeks to speed up access to the funds.

title: EU Targets Deal on Carbon Market Overhaul in First Quarter 2027
title_cn: 欧盟目标于 2027 年第一季度达成碳市场改革协议
summary: The European Union aims to agree on a planned reform of its flagship carbon market by early next year as part of a broader effort to speed up key changes to boost the bloc’s competitiveness.

title: Trump Tells BBC That King Charles’s Visit May Improve US-UK Ties
title_cn: 特朗普告诉 BBC，查尔斯国王的访问可能会改善美英关系
summary: President Donald Trump said a visit by King Charles III to the US next week could help improve US-UK ties that have soured over Prime Minister Keir Starmer’s stance on immigration and reluctance to get involved in the Iran war.

title: Italian Premier Meloni Says EU Energy Proposals Aren’t Enough
title_cn: 意大利总理梅洛尼表示欧盟能源提案还不够
summary: Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni warned that the European Union’s proposals to tackle the energy crisis caused by the war in Iran have fallen short of what’s needed.

title: Sheinbaum Waiting for US Green Light to Name Mexico’s New Envoy
title_cn: 辛鲍姆等待美国批准任命墨西哥新特使
summary: President Claudia Sheinbaum said she’s waiting on US approval to name Roberto Lazzeri as Mexico’s next ambassador to Washington, as major security and trade questions hang over the crucial bilateral relationship.

title: US Air Force Plans to Boost Stockpile of Lockheed’s Stealth Missile
title_cn: 美国空军计划增加洛克希德隐形导弹的库存
summary: The US Air Force plans to buy nearly 4,300 long-range stealth cruise missiles from Lockheed Martin Corp. over the next five years, according to new budget documents, after using them against Iranian targets.

title: Trump’s Promise of Lower Oil Prices Clashes With Industry Fears
title_cn: 特朗普降低油价的承诺与行业担忧发生冲突
summary: President Donald Trump and his officials tell Americans almost daily that the spike in fuel costs is a temporary blip that will reverse just as soon as he reaches a deal to end the war in Iran.

title: US Oil CEOs Meet Venezuela President as Trump Seeks Oil Revival
title_cn: 特朗普寻求石油复兴，美国石油公司首席执行官会见委内瑞拉总统
summary: A group of US oil executives met Venezuela’s president in Caracas last week and pressed for assurances the nation was safe to invest in as the Trump administration urges them to rebuild its beleaguered energy sector.

title: Pimco Privately Lends $10 Billion to Gulf in Wartime Deals
title_cn: Pimco 通过战时交易向海湾地区私下提供 100 亿美元贷款
summary: As Persian Gulf states build cash buffers to deal with any potential economic fallout from the Iran war, one large buyer has stepped in: Pacific Investment Management Co.

title: Trump ‘Gold Card’ Visa Granted to Only One Person So Far, Lutnick Says
title_cn: 卢特尼克表示，到目前为止，特朗普“金卡”签证仅授予一人
summary: Only one person has been approved so far for Donald Trump’s “Gold Card” Visa program granting foreigners US residency for a $1 million fee, Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick said Thursday.

title: Estonia Calls for Ukraine’s Full EU Membership, ‘No Other Way’
title_cn: 爱沙尼亚呼吁乌克兰完全加入欧盟，“别无选择”
summary: Estonia’s prime minister said there’s no alternative to Ukraine’s full membership in the European Union as the bloc’s leaders gather to discuss closer ties with the war-battered nation.

title: Carney Says Booze Bans Can Be Resolved ‘Quickly’ With US Action
title_cn: 卡尼表示，美国的行动可以“迅速”解决禁酒令
summary: Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney says provincial liquor store bans on US alcohol can be resolved “quickly” if the Trump administration takes steps of its own to settle trade disputes.

title: ECB’s Nagel Says Trump’s Fed Attacks Caused Flight to Safety
title_cn: 欧洲央行内格尔表示，特朗普的美联储攻击导致人们逃往安全地带
summary: President Donald Trump’s repeated attacks on the Federal Reserve are backfiring as they cause distrust in US institutions and a flight from US assets and the dollar, European Central Bank Governing Council member Joachim Nagel said.
